pokemon:blacephalon.name: Blacephalon
pokemon:blacephalon.summary: A UB that appeared from an Ultra Wormhole, it causes explosions, then takes advantage of opponents’ surprise to rob them of their vitality.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: A UB that appeared from an Ultra Wormhole, it causes explosions, then takes advantage of opponents’ surprise to rob them of their vitality.
It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. It’s apparently one kind of Ultra Beast.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: A UB that appeared from an Ultra Wormhole, it causes explosions, then takes advantage of opponents’ surprise to rob them of their vitality.

form:blacephalon.name: Blacephalon
form:blacephalon.summary: Blacephalon form with Fire / Ghost typing.
